option.name: originalContent
option.value:
services: # ============================================ # BASES DE DONNÉES # ============================================
postgres-user: image: postgres:15-alpine environment: POSTGRES_DB: users_db POSTGRES_USER: user POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password ports: - "5432:5432" networks: - microservices-net volumes: - postgres-user-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U user -d users_db"] interval: 5s timeout: 5s retries: 5 restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
postgres-product: image: postgres:15-alpine environment: POSTGRES_DB: products_db POSTGRES_USER: user POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password ports: - "5433:5432" networks: - microservices-net volumes: - postgres-product-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U user -d products_db"] interval: 5s timeout: 5s retries: 5 restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
postgres-order: image: postgres:15-alpine environment: POSTGRES_DB: orders_db POSTGRES_USER: user POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password ports: - "5434:5432" networks: - microservices-net volumes: - postgres-order-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U user -d orders_db"] interval: 5s timeout: 5s retries: 5 restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
# ============================================ # CACHE # ============================================
redis: image: redis:7-alpine command: redis-server --appendonly yes --requirepass password ports: - "6379:6379" networks: - microservices-net volumes: - redis-data:/data healthcheck: test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "-a", "password", "ping"] interval: 5s timeout: 5s retries: 5 restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
# ============================================ # SEARCH ENGINE # ============================================
elasticsearch: image: elasticsearch:8.11.0 environment: - discovery.type=single-node - xpack.security.enabled=false - "ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m" ports: - "9200:9200" - "9300:9300" networks: - microservices-net volumes: - elasticsearch-data:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
kibana: image: kibana:8.11.0 environment: - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://elasticsearch:9200 ports: - "5601:5601" networks: - microservices-net depends_on: - elasticsearch restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
# ============================================ # MICROSERVICES # ============================================
user-service: build: ./backend/user-service ports: - "8001:8001" networks: - microservices-net environment: - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:password@postgres-user:5432/users_db - REDIS_URL=redis://:password@redis:6379 - JWT_SECRET=my-super-secret-key-change-me depends_on: postgres-user: condition: service_healthy redis: condition: service_healthy restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
product-service: build: ./backend/product-service ports: - "8002:8002" networks: - microservices-net environment: - PORT=8002 - DB_HOST=postgres-product - DB_PORT=5432 - DB_NAME=products_db - DB_USER=user - DB_PASSWORD=password - REDIS_URL=redis://:password@redis:6379 - ELASTICSEARCH_URL=http://elasticsearch:9200 depends_on: postgres-product: condition: service_healthy redis: condition: service_healthy elasticsearch: condition: service_started restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
order-service: build: ./backend/order-service ports: - "8003:8003" networks: - microservices-net environment: - SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL=jdbc:postgresql://postgres-order:5432/orders_db - SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME=user - SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD=password - REDIS_URL=redis://:password@redis:6379 depends_on: postgres-order: condition: service_healthy redis: condition: service_healthy restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
notification-service: build: ./backend/notification-service ports: - "8009:8004" networks: - microservices-net environment: - REDIS_URL=redis://:password@redis:6379 depends_on: redis: condition: service_healthy restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
# ============================================ # API GATEWAY # ============================================
api-gateway: build: ./backend/api-gateway ports: - "8000:8000" networks: - microservices-net environment: - USER_SERVICE_URL=http://user-service:8001 - PRODUCT_SERVICE_URL=http://product-service:8002 - ORDER_SERVICE_URL=http://order-service:8003 depends_on: - user-service - product-service - order-service restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
# ============================================ # FRONTEND # ============================================
frontend: build: ./frontend ports: - "3000:80" networks: - microservices-net depends_on: - api-gateway restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
# ============================================ # MONITORING (Optionnel) # ============================================
prometheus: image: prom/prometheus:latest ports: - "9090:9090" networks: - microservices-net volumes: - ./monitoring/prometheus/prometheus.yml:/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml - prometheus-data:/prometheus command: - '--config.file=/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml' - '--storage.tsdb.path=/prometheus' restart: unless-stopped profiles: - monitoring
grafana: image: grafana/grafana:latest ports: - "3001:3000" networks: - microservices-net environment: - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD=admin123 volumes: - grafana-data:/var/lib/grafana depends_on: - prometheus restart: unless-stopped profiles: - monitoring
# PostgreSQL avec PGVector pour RAG postgres-vector: image: pgvector/pgvector:pg16 environment: POSTGRES_DB: chatbot_db POSTGRES_USER: user POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password ports: - "5435:5432" networks: - microservices-net volumes: - postgres-vector-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U user -d chatbot_db"] interval: 5s timeout: 5s retries: 5 restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
# n8n pour les workflows n8n: image: n8nio/n8n:latest environment: - N8N_HOST=0.0.0.0 - N8N_PORT=5678 - N8N_PROTOCOL=http - WEBHOOK_URL=http://localhost:5678 - N8N_USER_FOLDER=/home/node/.n8n - EXECUTIONS_DATA_PRUNE=true - EXECUTIONS_DATA_MAX_AGE=168 ports: - "5678:5678" networks: - microservices-net volumes: - n8n-data:/home/node/.n8n restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
chatbot-service: build: ./backend/chatbot-service ports: - "8005:8005" networks: - microservices-net env_file: - .env # ← Charge toutes les variables du fichier .env environment: - SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL=jdbc:postgresql://postgres-vector:5432/chatbot_db - SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME=user - SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD=password - GOOGLE_GEMINI_API_KEY=AIzaSyD3QdPN0H2PsA_jz-t8yTlXF5wbYaUszFI - N8N_WEBHOOK_URL=http://n8n:5678/webhook - JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx1024m depends_on: postgres-vector: condition: service_healthy n8n: condition: service_started user-service: condition: service_started product-service: condition: service_started order-service: condition: service_started restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
# ============================================ # RÉSEAUX # ============================================
networks: microservices-net: driver: bridge name: microservices-net
# ============================================ # VOLUMES PERSISTANTS # ============================================
volumes: postgres-user-data: name: microservices_postgres_user_data external: false postgres-product-data: name: microservices_postgres_product_data external: false postgres-order-data: name: microservices_postgres_order_data external: false redis-data: name: microservices_redis_data external: false elasticsearch-data: name: microservices_elasticsearch_data external: false prometheus-data: name: microservices_prometheus_data external: false grafana-data: name: microservices_grafana_data external: false postgres-vector-data: name: microservices_postgres_vector_data external: false n8n-data: name: microservices_n8n_data external: false

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
services: # ============================================ # BASES DE DONNÉES # ============================================
postgres-user: image: postgres:15-alpine environment: POSTGRES_DB: users_db POSTGRES_USER: user POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password ports: - "5432:5432" networks: - microservices-net volumes: - postgres-user-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U user -d users_db"] interval: 5s timeout: 5s retries: 5 restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
postgres-product: image: postgres:15-alpine environment: POSTGRES_DB: products_db POSTGRES_USER: user POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password ports: - "5433:5432" networks: - microservices-net volumes: - postgres-product-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U user -d products_db"] interval: 5s timeout: 5s retries: 5 restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
postgres-order: image: postgres:15-alpine environment: POSTGRES_DB: orders_db POSTGRES_USER: user POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password ports: - "5434:5432" networks: - microservices-net volumes: - postgres-order-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U user -d orders_db"] interval: 5s timeout: 5s retries: 5 restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
# ============================================ # CACHE # ============================================
redis: image: redis:7-alpine command: redis-server --appendonly yes --requirepass password ports: - "6379:6379" networks: - microservices-net volumes: - redis-data:/data healthcheck: test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "-a", "password", "ping"] interval: 5s timeout: 5s retries: 5 restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
# ============================================ # SEARCH ENGINE # ============================================
elasticsearch: image: elasticsearch:8.11.0 environment: - discovery.type=single-node - xpack.security.enabled=false - "ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m" ports: - "9200:9200" - "9300:9300" networks: - microservices-net volumes: - elasticsearch-data:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
kibana: image: kibana:8.11.0 environment: - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://elasticsearch:9200 ports: - "5601:5601" networks: - microservices-net depends_on: - elasticsearch restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
# ============================================ # MICROSERVICES # ============================================
user-service: build: ./backend/user-service ports: - "8001:8001" networks: - microservices-net environment: - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:password@postgres-user:5432/users_db - REDIS_URL=redis://:password@redis:6379 - JWT_SECRET=my-super-secret-key-change-me depends_on: postgres-user: condition: service_healthy redis: condition: service_healthy restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
product-service: build: ./backend/product-service ports: - "8002:8002" networks: - microservices-net environment: - PORT=8002 - DB_HOST=postgres-product - DB_PORT=5432 - DB_NAME=products_db - DB_USER=user - DB_PASSWORD=password - REDIS_URL=redis://:password@redis:6379 - ELASTICSEARCH_URL=http://elasticsearch:9200 depends_on: postgres-product: condition: service_healthy redis: condition: service_healthy elasticsearch: condition: service_started restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
order-service: build: ./backend/order-service ports: - "8003:8003" networks: - microservices-net environment: - SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL=jdbc:postgresql://postgres-order:5432/orders_db - SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME=user - SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD=password - REDIS_URL=redis://:password@redis:6379 - N8N_WEBHOOK_URL=http://n8n:5678/webhook/order-created depends_on: postgres-order: condition: service_healthy redis: condition: service_healthy restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
notification-service: build: ./backend/notification-service ports: - "8009:8004" networks: - microservices-net environment: - REDIS_URL=redis://:password@redis:6379 depends_on: redis: condition: service_healthy restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
# ============================================ # API GATEWAY # ============================================
api-gateway: build: ./backend/api-gateway ports: - "8000:8000" networks: - microservices-net environment: - USER_SERVICE_URL=http://user-service:8001 - PRODUCT_SERVICE_URL=http://product-service:8002 - ORDER_SERVICE_URL=http://order-service:8003 depends_on: - user-service - product-service - order-service restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
# ============================================ # FRONTEND # ============================================
frontend: build: ./frontend ports: - "3000:80" networks: - microservices-net depends_on: - api-gateway restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
# ============================================ # MONITORING (Optionnel) # ============================================
prometheus: image: prom/prometheus:latest ports: - "9090:9090" networks: - microservices-net volumes: - ./monitoring/prometheus/prometheus.yml:/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml - prometheus-data:/prometheus command: - '--config.file=/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml' - '--storage.tsdb.path=/prometheus' restart: unless-stopped profiles: - monitoring
grafana: image: grafana/grafana:latest ports: - "3001:3000" networks: - microservices-net environment: - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD=admin123 volumes: - grafana-data:/var/lib/grafana depends_on: - prometheus restart: unless-stopped profiles: - monitoring
# PostgreSQL avec PGVector pour RAG postgres-vector: image: pgvector/pgvector:pg16 environment: POSTGRES_DB: chatbot_db POSTGRES_USER: user POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password ports: - "5435:5432" networks: - microservices-net volumes: - postgres-vector-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U user -d chatbot_db"] interval: 5s timeout: 5s retries: 5 restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
# n8n pour les workflows n8n: image: n8nio/n8n:latest environment: - N8N_HOST=0.0.0.0 - N8N_PORT=5678 - N8N_PROTOCOL=http - WEBHOOK_URL=http://localhost:5678 - N8N_USER_FOLDER=/home/node/.n8n - EXECUTIONS_DATA_PRUNE=true - EXECUTIONS_DATA_MAX_AGE=168 ports: - "5678:5678" networks: - microservices-net volumes: - n8n-data:/home/node/.n8n restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
chatbot-service: build: ./backend/chatbot-service ports: - "8005:8005" networks: - microservices-net env_file: - .env # ← Charge toutes les variables du fichier .env environment: - SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL=jdbc:postgresql://postgres-vector:5432/chatbot_db - SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME=user - SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD=password - GOOGLE_GEMINI_API_KEY=AIzaSyD3QdPN0H2PsA_jz-t8yTlXF5wbYaUszFI - N8N_WEBHOOK_URL=http://n8n:5678/webhook - JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx1024m depends_on: postgres-vector: condition: service_healthy n8n: condition: service_started user-service: condition: service_started product-service: condition: service_started order-service: condition: service_started restart: unless-stopped logging: driver: "json-file" options: max-size: "10m" max-file: "3"
# ============================================ # RÉSEAUX # ============================================
networks: microservices-net: driver: bridge name: microservices-net
# ============================================ # VOLUMES PERSISTANTS # ============================================
volumes: postgres-user-data: name: microservices_postgres_user_data external: false postgres-product-data: name: microservices_postgres_product_data external: false postgres-order-data: name: microservices_postgres_order_data external: false redis-data: name: microservices_redis_data external: false elasticsearch-data: name: microservices_elasticsearch_data external: false prometheus-data: name: microservices_prometheus_data external: false grafana-data: name: microservices_grafana_data external: false postgres-vector-data: name: microservices_postgres_vector_data external: false n8n-data: name: microservices_n8n_data external: false
